olmo.issue: Data table has no accessible name; screen reader users cannot tell what the table contains.
olmo.suggested_fix: Add aria-label="Class schedule by week" to the table.

olmo.issue: The grade weighting table has no accessible name.
olmo.suggested_fix: Add aria-label="Grade weighting breakdown" to the table.

olmo.issue: Grade table header cells use rowspan and colspan without scope; the header associations are semantically incorrect for screen readers.
olmo.suggested_fix: Restructure the header row so each data cell is associated with the correct column and row headers.

gemini.issue: Table is missing an accessible name so its purpose is unclear to assistive technology.
gemini.suggested_fix: Add aria-label="Class schedule by week" to the table element.

gemini.issue: Image alt text is verbose and repeats the phrase 'Accessible University'; rewrite it to be concise.
gemini.suggested_fix: Rewrite the alt text to a concise description of the logo.

gemini.issue: Grade table header structure is wrong; rowspan/colspan headers lack scope and associations.
gemini.suggested_fix: A human should rebuild the header associations for this complex table.

gpt.issue: The schedule table lacks an accessible name for assistive technology.
gpt.suggested_fix: Add aria-label="Class schedule by week" to the table.

gpt.issue: Alt text on the logo image is overly long and should be tightened.
gpt.suggested_fix: Provide concise alt text for the image.

gpt.issue: This element is missing alt text and is inaccessible to screen reader users.
gpt.suggested_fix: Add alt="Course syllabus heading" to the element.
